per_criterion_scores.internal_note: The student clearly identifies relevant syntactic structures such as noun phrases, verb phrases, and clauses.
The student addresses some ambiguities but could further clarify how to handle complex sentence structures and multiple interpretations.
The student specifies parsing tasks but could better articulate the relationships between syntactic structures.

justification: The student demonstrates partial understanding by identifying core syntactic structures well but needs minor improvements in clarifying ambiguities and specifying parsing goals.
